name: Banana Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the cereal, milk and banana. Let stand for 2 minutes or until the cereal is soft.
2. Add oil and egg; mix well.
3. Stir in dry ingredients into the bran mixture only until moistened.
4. Spoon batter into greased muffin cups.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes. Yields 6 large or 12 normal size muffins.
